title: Senior Brand Designer
description:
About the Company
Owner.com helps independent restaurants grow through a digital platform that drives discovery, direct orders, and repeat business without relying on third-party marketplaces.


About the Role
Owner.com is hiring a remote Senior Brand Designer to design and evolve scalable brand systems, develop innovative storytelling strategies, and partner with product, marketing, and agency teams on high-profile creative work.


Responsibilities
  • Design and evolve scalable brand systems across all surfaces and touchpoints
  • Develop innovative concepts and storytelling strategies that drive brand expression
  • Partner with product, marketing, and external agencies on creative solutions aligned with business goals
  • Manage high-profile projects from concept to delivery with strategic and hands-on rigor
  • Stay informed about industry trends, emerging technologies, and cultural shifts


Requirements
  • Strong portfolio demonstrating brand system design and high-craft visual work
  • Experience leading brand identity and campaign work across digital and physical touchpoints
  • Excellent cross-functional collaboration and project management skills
  • High standards for quality, attention to detail, and polished final execution


Compensation
$190,000 - $220,000 USD per year.


Location
Remote (United States).
keywords: brand design,senior designer,brand systems,creative leadership,remote USA
skills: Brand design,Brand systems,Visual identity,Creative direction,Cross-functional collaboration

Remote (United Kingdom).
